questions.prompt: The doctor convinced me... so much fat.
When you get to the hotel, we... in the lobby.
They gave us the wrong room... mistake.
Several foreign languages are taught in this school.
answers: We / They teach several foreign languages in this school

questions.prompt: Today someone sent this interesting article to everyone in the group.
answers: Today this interesting article was sent to everyone in the group
Today everyone in the group was sent this interesting article

questions.prompt: Nicole’s parents heard those rumours from their neighbours.
questions.instruction: Give a question for the underlined words.
answers: Who did Nicole’s parents hear those rumours from?
From whom did Nicole’s parents hear those rumours?

questions.prompt: The new language assistant has a lovely Irish accent. I immediately took notice of it.
answers: The new language assistant has a lovely Irish accent, which I immediately took notice of
The new language assistant has a lovely Irish accent, of which I immediately took notice

questions.prompt: The night was so dark that we couldn’t see a thing.
answers: It was such a dark night that we couldn’t see a thing

questions.prompt: We would have left the party...

answers: I haven’t seen him since 2019 / for four years

questions.prompt: Most people is used to check their email daily.
questions.instruction: Find the mistakes and rewrite correctly.
answers: Most people are used to checking their email daily

questions.prompt: ‘What was the weather like during your holiday abroad?’ Alison asked me.
answers: Alison asked (me) what the weather was like / had been like during my / our holiday abroad
Alison asked what the weather was like / had been like during my / our holiday abroad

questions.prompt: Use the words in the boxes to make a meaningful sentence. Use all and only the words in the boxes without changing their form.
questions.instruction: Words: was / arrive / time / he / in / happy / appointment / to / the / for
answers: He was happy to arrive in time for the appointment
